meta.title: Family Stay
meta.description: Practical guest guide preset for family apartments, holiday homes and multi-room rentals.

headline.en: A guest guide built for family logistics, not just pretty presentation.
headline.it: A guest guide built for family logistics, not just pretty presentation.
headline.fr: A guest guide built for family logistics, not just pretty presentation.

subtitle.en: Wi-Fi, arrival, kitchen notes, nearby basics and support in one calm mobile page.
subtitle.it: Wi-Fi, arrival, kitchen notes, nearby basics and support in one calm mobile page.
subtitle.fr: Wi-Fi, arrival, kitchen notes, nearby basics and support in one calm mobile page.

welcome.en: Family stays work better when the essentials are obvious before the first unpacking moment.
welcome.it: Family stays work better when the essentials are obvious before the first unpacking moment.
welcome.fr: Family stays work better when the essentials are obvious before the first unpacking moment.

footerNote.en: Built for family apartments, short holiday homes and practical multi-room stays.
footerNote.it: Built for family apartments, short holiday homes and practical multi-room stays.
footerNote.fr: Built for family apartments, short holiday homes and practical multi-room stays.

intro.en: Write a short message guests can read before contacting you.
intro.it: Scrivi un breve messaggio che gli ospiti possano leggere prima di contattarti.
intro.fr: Ecrivez un court message que les voyageurs peuvent lire avant de vous contacter.

title.en: A calmer guide for practical family hosting
title.it: A calmer guide for practical family hosting
title.fr: A calmer guide for practical family hosting

copy.en: Surface the things families ask for most: Wi-Fi, arrival, kitchen basics, child-friendly notes and where to get essentials nearby.
copy.it: Surface the things families ask for most: Wi-Fi, arrival, kitchen basics, child-friendly notes and where to get essentials nearby.
copy.fr: Surface the things families ask for most: Wi-Fi, arrival, kitchen basics, child-friendly notes and where to get essentials nearby.

copy.en: Use the map for grocery stores, pharmacies, parking and family-friendly coffee stops.
copy.it: Use the map for grocery stores, pharmacies, parking and family-friendly coffee stops.
copy.fr: Use the map for grocery stores, pharmacies, parking and family-friendly coffee stops.

title.en: Reassuring, clear and easy to skim.
title.it: Reassuring, clear and easy to skim.
title.fr: Reassuring, clear and easy to skim.

body.en: Family guests do not need a romantic manifesto. They need confidence that the stay is set up for real routines.
body.it: Family guests do not need a romantic manifesto. They need confidence that the stay is set up for real routines.
body.fr: Family guests do not need a romantic manifesto. They need confidence that the stay is set up for real routines.

en: Mention baby gear clearly if you have it.
Call out the nearest grocery and pharmacy.
Use kitchen and laundry notes to reduce repetitive questions.
it: Indica chiaramente eventuale baby gear disponibile.
Segnala grocery e farmacia piu vicine.
Usa note cucina e lavanderia per ridurre domande ripetitive.
fr: Indiquez clairement le materiel bebe si vous en avez.
Signalez l epicerie et la pharmacie les plus proches.
Utilisez les notes cuisine et lessive pour reduire les questions repetitives.

copy.en: Keep one direct host number and one backup for practical issues.
copy.it: Keep one direct host number and one backup for practical issues.
copy.fr: Keep one direct host number and one backup for practical issues.

description.en: Give guests a quick way to connect without searching in messages.
description.it: Dai agli ospiti un modo rapido per connettersi senza cercare nei messaggi.
description.fr: Donnez aux voyageurs un acces rapide au Wi-Fi sans fouiller dans les messages.

title.it: Condividi i dettagli rete con stile
title.fr: Partagez les details reseau avec style

copy.en: Use the built-in buttons for one-tap copying and direct connection on supported devices.
copy.it: Usa i pulsanti inclusi per copiare in un tap e collegarti direttamente sui dispositivi supportati.
copy.fr: Utilisez les boutons integres pour copier en un tap et se connecter directement sur les appareils compatibles.

description.en: Summarize building access, timing and the best last-mile route.
description.it: Riassumi accesso al palazzo, orari e il miglior ultimo tratto.
description.fr: Resumez acces, horaires et meilleur dernier kilometre.

title.en: Keep first access clear and short
title.it: Rendi il primo accesso chiaro e breve
title.fr: Gardez l'acces initial clair et court

copy.en: This section works best when every instruction answers a real arrival question and nothing more.
copy.it: Questa sezione funziona meglio quando ogni istruzione risponde a una vera domanda di arrivo e nulla di piu.
copy.fr: Cette section fonctionne mieux lorsque chaque instruction repond a une vraie question d'arrivee et rien de plus.

text.en: Standard arrival from 15:00. Message the host for luggage drop or late check-in support.
text.it: Arrivo standard dalle 15:00. Scrivi all'host per deposito bagagli o supporto late check-in.
text.fr: Arrivee standard a partir de 15h00. Ecrivez a l'host pour depot bagages ou arrivee tardive.

text.en: The walk takes around 18 minutes. Use this route to avoid the busiest vehicle-only streets.
text.it: La camminata dura circa 18 minuti. Usa questo percorso per evitare le strade piu trafficate.
text.fr: La marche prend environ 18 minutes. Utilisez cet itineraire pour eviter les rues les plus chargees.

description.en: The few important notes to ensure a smooth stay.
description.it: Le poche note importanti per garantire un soggiorno tranquillo.
description.fr: Les quelques notes importantes pour assurer un bon séjour.

title.en: Respect the space and the neighbors
title.it: Rispetta lo spazio e i vicini

copy.en: These few rules help us maintain the property in perfect condition for everyone.
copy.it: Queste poche regole ci aiutano a mantenere la struttura in perfette condizioni per tutti.
copy.fr: Ces quelques règles nous aident à maintenir la propriété en parfait état pour tous.

text.en: Please keep noise low after 22:00 and inside the common staircase.
text.it: Mantieni il rumore basso dopo le 22:00 e nelle scale comuni.
text.fr: Merci de limiter le bruit après 22h00 et dans l'escalier commun.

text.en: Smoking is strictly forbidden inside. You can smoke on the balcony.
text.it: È severamente vietato fumare all'interno. Puoi fumare sul balcone.
text.fr: Il est strictement interdit de fumer à l'intérieur. Vous pouvez fumer sur le balcon.

description.en: Call out baby gear, laundry help and the small details that reduce parent stress.
description.it: Call out baby gear, laundry help and the small details that reduce parent stress.
description.fr: Call out baby gear, laundry help and the small details that reduce parent stress.

title.en: The small practical details matter most here
title.it: The small practical details matter most here
title.fr: The small practical details matter most here

copy.en: Use this module for baby gear, laundry expectations and any child-friendly note that saves a message.
copy.it: Use this module for baby gear, laundry expectations and any child-friendly note that saves a message.
copy.fr: Use this module for baby gear, laundry expectations and any child-friendly note that saves a message.

text.en: List what is included: crib, high chair, bath seat or stroller-friendly access.
text.it: List what is included: crib, high chair, bath seat or stroller-friendly access.
text.fr: List what is included: crib, high chair, bath seat or stroller-friendly access.

text.en: Explain where detergent is stored, how the washer works and whether drying racks are available.
text.it: Explain where detergent is stored, how the washer works and whether drying racks are available.
text.fr: Explain where detergent is stored, how the washer works and whether drying racks are available.

text.en: Recommend one nearby pharmacy or pediatric-friendly urgent care option for peace of mind.
text.it: Recommend one nearby pharmacy or pediatric-friendly urgent care option for peace of mind.
text.fr: Recommend one nearby pharmacy or pediatric-friendly urgent care option for peace of mind.

description.en: Explain coffee, cookware, kid-friendly meals and what guests can use freely.
description.it: Explain coffee, cookware, kid-friendly meals and what guests can use freely.
description.fr: Explain coffee, cookware, kid-friendly meals and what guests can use freely.

title.en: Answer the kitchen questions before breakfast
title.it: Answer the kitchen questions before breakfast
title.fr: Answer the kitchen questions before breakfast

copy.en: Families often need to know how the coffee works, where breakfast basics live and what is safe to use for kids.
copy.it: Families often need to know how the coffee works, where breakfast basics live and what is safe to use for kids.
copy.fr: Families often need to know how the coffee works, where breakfast basics live and what is safe to use for kids.

text.en: Show how to use the coffee setup and whether tea, sugar or oil are provided.
text.it: Show how to use the coffee setup and whether tea, sugar or oil are provided.
text.fr: Show how to use the coffee setup and whether tea, sugar or oil are provided.

text.en: Mention pans, oven use and whether guests can use freezer or dishwasher.
text.it: Mention pans, oven use and whether guests can use freezer or dishwasher.
text.fr: Mention pans, oven use and whether guests can use freezer or dishwasher.

text.en: Point to the closest reliable grocery for milk, fruit, water and simple meals.
text.it: Point to the closest reliable grocery for milk, fruit, water and simple meals.
text.fr: Point to the closest reliable grocery for milk, fruit, water and simple meals.

description.en: Everything you need to know before leaving.
description.it: Tutto quello che devi sapere prima di partire.
description.fr: Tout ce que vous devez savoir avant de partir.

copy.en: No need to clean, just a few quick checks before closing the door.
copy.it: Non serve pulire, solo un rapido controllo prima di chiudere la porta.
copy.fr: Pas besoin de nettoyer, juste quelques vérifications avant de fermer la porte.

text.en: Standard checkout is at 10:30. Let us know if you need to store luggage.
text.it: Il checkout standard è alle 10:30. Facci sapere se hai bisogno di depositare i bagagli.
text.fr: Le départ standard est à 10h30. Dites-nous si vous devez laisser des bagages.

text.en: Leave the keys on the console table, turn off the lights and ensure the door is locked behind you.
text.it: Lascia le chiavi sul mobile all'ingresso, spegni le luci e assicurati che la porta sia chiusa.
text.fr: Laissez les clés sur la console, éteignez les lumières et assurez-vous que la porte est fermée.

description.it: Numeri importanti e informazioni sulla sicurezza.
description.fr: Numéros importants et informations de sécurité.

copy.en: In case of immediate danger, always call the national emergency number first.
copy.it: In caso di pericolo immediato, chiama sempre prima il numero di emergenza nazionale.
copy.fr: En cas de danger immédiat, appelez toujours d'abord le numéro d'urgence national.

text.en: Call 112 for police, ambulance or fire department.
text.it: Chiama 112 per polizia, ambulanza o vigili del fuoco.
text.fr: Appelez le 112 pour la police, l'ambulance ou les pompiers.
Situé dans le placard de la salle de bain.

description.en: Map the grocery, pharmacy, playground or parking that matters most to families.
description.it: Map the grocery, pharmacy, playground or parking that matters most to families.
description.fr: Map the grocery, pharmacy, playground or parking that matters most to families.

copy.it: Prioritize the stops that make a family stay feel easier in the first 24 hours.
copy.fr: Prioritize the stops that make a family stay feel easier in the first 24 hours.
